CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISBLANK( Collage__c ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Collage__c)), ISBLANK(TEXT(Collage__r.Grant_Status__c)) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Collage__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Collage__r.Grant_Status__c))), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Collage__r.Grant_Status__c,'Granted')) ) ), Salary__c + GST__c, Salary__c+0 )
CustomField.label: Total Salary
